name: Knoll, Inc.
description: Knoll, Inc. is a renowned designer and manufacturer of high-quality office and residential furniture, textiles, and accessories. Founded in 1938, the company has established a legacy of modern design, collaborating with iconic architects and designers to create timeless pieces that define the workplace and home. Headquartered in East Greenville, Pennsylvania, Knoll is recognized for its commitment to sustainable design and innovation. As part of the MillerKnoll collective, the company continues to provide comprehensive furnishing solutions for commercial, educational, healthcare, and government organizations, maintaining its status as a leader in the global furniture industry.
